bms.title: BMS Integration
bms.subtitle: Configure integration with Brius Message System
bms.notConfiguredDescription: Configure your integration with Brius Message System for contact, label, and campaign synchronization.

modal.title: Configure BMS Integration
modal.description: Configure integration with Brius Message System (BMS) for contact, label, and campaign synchronization.

apiKey.label: BMS API Key
apiKey.hint: Enter your Brius Message System API key

contactSync.label: Synchronize Contacts
contactSync.description: Enables automatic contact synchronization with BMS

labelSync.label: Synchronize Labels
labelSync.description: Enables automatic label synchronization with BMS

customAttributesSync.label: Synchronize Custom Attributes
customAttributesSync.description: Enables custom attribute synchronization with BMS

campaignSync.label: Synchronize Campaigns
campaignSync.description: Enables automatic campaign synchronization with BMS

security.title: Security:
security.description: Your API key will be stored securely and encrypted. Never share your BMS API key with third parties.

featuresCard.title: Available Features
featuresCard.contactSync: Contact Synchronization: Keep contacts synchronized between systems
featuresCard.labelManagement: Label Management: Automatically synchronize tags and categories
featuresCard.customAttributes: Custom Attributes: Transfer custom data between platforms
featuresCard.campaigns: Integrated Campaigns: Connect marketing and communication campaigns
featuresCard.unifiedHistory: Unified History: See all interaction history in one place

deleteDialog.title: Remove BMS Integration
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove the integration with BMS? All synchronization features will be disabled and this action cannot be undone.

bms.name: BMS Email Provider
bms.description: Provider of transactional email via BMS API
bms.ipPoolDescription: Pool of IPs for email sending. Default: evoapicloud
bms.senderEmailDescription: Email that will appear as sender in sent emails

placeholders.apiKey: Enter the API Key of BMS
placeholders.ipPool: Enter the IP Pool of BMS

dashboardApps.title: Dashboard Applications
dashboardApps.subtitle: Configure custom applications to integrate with the dashboard
dashboardApps.notConfiguredDescription: Configure custom applications to integrate with the dashboard.

url.label: Application URL
url.hint: URL that will be loaded in the dashboard

info.title: Important:
info.description: Make sure the URL is configured to allow loading in iframe if it's of type 'frame'. Check that there are no X-Frame-Options restrictions.

empty.title: No applications configured
empty.description: Configure custom applications to integrate with the dashboard.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Dashboard Application
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the application "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete Dashboard Applications
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected dashboard application(s)? This action cannot be undone.

error.title: Error
error.heading: Unable to load application
error.description: The requested application could not be found or you don't have permission to access it.

modal.title: Configure Google Translate Integration
modal.description: Configure integration with Google Translate for automatic message translation and language detection.

projectId.label: Google Cloud Project ID
projectId.placeholder: Enter your Google Cloud project ID
projectId.hint: Google Cloud project ID with Translate API enabled

defaultLanguage.label: Default Translation Language
defaultLanguage.hint: Language to which messages will be translated by default

enableAgentBot.label: Translation for Team Members
enableAgentBot.description: Allows team members to see translations of customer messages

enableAutoTranslate.label: Automatic Translation
enableAutoTranslate.description: Automatically translates received messages to the default language

enableDetection.label: Language Detection
enableDetection.description: Automatically detects the language of received messages

warning.title: Required Configuration:
warning.description: This integration requires Google Cloud credentials configuration on the server. Contact your system administrator to complete the configuration.

modal.title: Configure LeadSquared Integration
modal.description: Configure the integration with LeadSquared CRM for lead and activity synchronization.

conversationActivity.label: Conversation Activity
conversationActivity.description: Registers conversations as activities in LeadSquared

transcriptActivity.label: Transcript Activity
transcriptActivity.description: Registers complete transcripts as activities in LeadSquared

security.title: Security:
security.description: Your credentials will be stored securely and encrypted. Never share your API LeadSquared credentials with third parties.

header.title: OAuth Applications
header.subtitle: Configure OAuth applications for integration with external APIs

redirectUri.label: Redirect URI
redirectUri.hint: URL to where the user will be redirected after authorization

scopes.label: Scopes
scopes.hint: Permissions separated by space. Ex: read:conversations write:messages
scopes.required: At least one scope is required

security.title: Security:
security.description: After creating the application, you will receive a Client ID and Client Secret. Keep the Client Secret secure - it cannot be recovered after creation, only regenerated.

empty.title: No OAuth applications configured
empty.description: Create your first OAuth application to enable integrations with external APIs.

deleteDialog.title: Delete OAuth Application
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the OAuth application "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete OAuth Applications
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected OAuth application(s)? This action cannot be undone.

header.title: OpenAI Integration
header.subtitle: Configure OpenAI integration for AI features

modal.title: Configure OpenAI Integration
modal.description: Integrate with OpenAI to bring advanced AI features to your dashboard using GPT models.

apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
apiKey.hint: Enter your OpenAI API key to configure the integration

enableAudioTranscription.label: Enable Audio Transcription
enableAudioTranscription.description: Automatically transcribe incoming audio messages using OpenAI Whisper API
enableAudioTranscription.hint: When enabled, all incoming audio messages will be automatically transcribed and displayed alongside the audio player

security.title: Security:
security.description: Your API key will be stored securely and encrypted. Never share your OpenAI API key with third parties.

notConfigured.title: OpenAI not configured
notConfigured.description: Configure your integration with OpenAI to take advantage of advanced AI features in your conversations.

features.title: Available Features
features.suggestions: Smart Response Suggestions: AI generates intelligent suggestions based on context
features.summaries: Conversation Summaries: Create automatic summaries of conversations
features.improvement: Text Improvement: Refine the tone and writing of messages
features.correction: Automatic Correction: Correct grammar and spelling
features.labels: Automated Label Suggestions: Suggestions for conversation labels

deleteDialog.title: Remove OpenAI Integration
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to remove the integration with OpenAI? All AI features will be disabled and this action cannot be undone.

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.customPromptsDescription: Configure the prompts for different functionalities of OpenAI
openai.enableAudioTranscriptionDescription: Automatically transcribe incoming audio messages using OpenAI Whisper API

placeholders.apiKey: Enter the API Key of OpenAI
placeholders.sentimentAnalysis: Prompt for sentiment analysis of Facebook comments
placeholders.generatePrompt: Prompt for generating personalized prompts based on context
placeholders.reviewPrompt: Prompt for reviewing and optimizing existing prompts

pipeline_item.cancelled.name: Pipeline Item Cancelled

pipeline_task.updated.description: When a pipeline task is updated

pipeline_task.completed.description: When a pipeline task is marked as completed

pipeline_task.cancelled.name: Pipeline Task Cancelled
pipeline_task.cancelled.description: When a pipeline task is cancelled
